Poll Workers
Elections in Pennsylvania are made possible by thousands of regular citizens serving as poll workers across the Commonwealth. We all depend on responsible workers to run smooth elections. Get involved today!

2025 "I Voted" Sticker Contest Submissions
You can view the sticker designs submitted for the Venango County "I Voted" Sticker Contest. The winning design will be announced soon.
Venango County Kids Election Results
If you are not a U.S. citizen and a resident of Pennsylvania at least 30 days before the next election, you CANNOT register to vote.
If you have any questions, please call 1.877.VOTESPA (1.877.868.3772).
